*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: tests/test_parse_thinking_budget.py
import pytest


def test_parse_thinking_budget():
    from thinking_budget import parse_thinking_budget

    # Numeric strings
    assert parse_thinking_budget("0") == 0
    assert parse_thinking_budget("4096") == 4096
    assert parse_thinking_budget("100_000") == 100000

    # Preset keywords (case-insensitive)
    assert parse_thinking_budget("low") == 1024
    assert parse_thinking_budget("LOW") == 1024
    assert parse_thinking_budget("medium") == 2048
    assert parse_thinking_budget("Medium") == 2048
    assert parse_thinking_budget("high") == 4096
    assert parse_thinking_budget("HIGH") == 4096

    # Edge cases
    assert parse_thinking_budget("  4096  ") == 4096
    assert parse_thinking_budget(" high ") == 4096

    # Invalid input
    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Invalid thinking budget"):
        parse_thinking_budget("invalid")

    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Invalid thinking budget"):
        parse_thinking_budget("")

    with pytest.raises(ValueError, match="Invalid thinking budget"):
        parse_thinking_budget("-1")
